title: Set up project repository
description: Initialize the Git repo, configure CI/CD pipeline and branch protection rules.
details: Create the repository on GitHub, set up branch protection on main, configure GitHub Actions for lint and test on PR.

title: Design database schema
description: Define all entities, relationships and indexes for the core domain.
details: Cover users, projects, tasks and notifications tables. Include soft-delete and audit columns.

title: Implement authentication module
description: JWT-based login, refresh token rotation and role-based access control.
details: Use access + refresh token pair stored in localStorage. Implement auto-refresh on 401 responses.

title: Build dashboard UI components
description: Sidebar, header, stat cards and data tables using shadcn/ui.

title: Write API integration tests
description: Cover all critical endpoints with integration tests using Jest and Supertest.

title: Set up Docker & deployment pipeline
description: Dockerize the app and configure deployment to the staging server.
details: Use multi-stage Docker build. Deploy via GitHub Actions on merge to main.

title: Refactor legacy notification service
description: Replace the old polling mechanism with WebSocket-based real-time notifications.
